seo.title: Contact Big Three Games
seo.description: Contact Big Three Games for Heritage press coverage, community feedback, and general studio inquiries.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.summary: Reach our team for press coverage, creator collaborations, player feedback, and support questions about Heritage. We do not offer external development services.

form.heading: Send a Message
form.purpose: Use this form for press requests, creator coverage, player feedback, and gameplay questions.
form.responseTime: We usually respond within two business days.
form.privacyNote: Privacy note: submitted details are used only to respond to your inquiry.

aside.heading: Other Ways to Reach Us
aside.body: If your request is urgent or you prefer email, contact us directly.
aside.servicesNote: We only create and improve our own games. We are not offering external development services.
